title: Smoky Tunisian Egg Tagine
description: A traditional Tunisian dish with a smoky twist, featuring eggs and spices, cooked in a molcajete vessel, this recipe is diabetic friendly and offers a unique flavor experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large molcajete, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the spice mixture over the onion and garlic mixture and stir to combine.
Create 6 wells in the mixture and crack an egg into each well.
Transfer the molcajete to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Remove the molcajete from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
Serve the smoky Tunisian egg tagine hot, directly from the molcajete.
